name: Consolidated Memory Patterns & Protocol
title: Universal Memory Management Patterns
description: The authoritative reference for memory types, tiers, and retrieval patterns in the Antigravity Agent Factory, aligned with the Memory Management Protocol (MMP).

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Memory tiers enable verifiable context lifetimes via L0-L2 isolation.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: Deterministic identifiers ensure the user can audit precisely what context an agent is retrieving.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: Explicit prefixing (SOP:, TASK:) makes memory navigation human-readable and traceable.
axiomAlignment.A5_consistency: Unified patterns eliminate fragmented behavior across specialists.

L0_static.scope: Global axioms, rules, and fundamental system constants.

L1_capability.scope: Standard workflows, agent definitions, technical skills, and stable patterns.

L2_operational.scope: Active issue state, session-specific observations, and real-time execution trails.

deterministic_identification.description: Accessing nodes via exact prefixed IDs to eliminate keyword search failures.
best_practices: Always use open_nodes for known system entities.

memory_first_registration.description: Registering execution state in real-time during workflow phase transitions.
memory_first_registration.trigger: Entering PLANNING, EXECUTION, or VERIFICATION phases.

inductive_synchronization.description: Systematically reflecting L1 knowledge files into the graph.

session_context_anchoring.description: Linking transient task nodes to the system-root for traceability.

best_practices: Never guess path syntax; query Memory MCP first.
Use mcp_memory_open_nodes as the primary retrieval mechanism.
Purge transient L2 tokens after solution reporting to maintain graph performance.

anti_patterns.name: Static Bloat
anti_patterns.problem: Flooding the graph with raw file contents instead of semantic abstractions.
anti_patterns.fix: Use sync_memory.py to ingest summarized patterns only.

anti_patterns.name: Orphaned Tasks
anti_patterns.problem: Creating task nodes without relations to SOPs or Epics.
anti_patterns.fix: Always link TASK: nodes to their governing SOP: and SYARCH: nodes.
